message:
feat(watchdog): add operational telemetry counters to AdaptiveWatchdog [ft-3kxe.19]

Wire 9 counters (observations, observations_matched, health_checks,
classifications, resets, status_healthy/degraded/critical/hung) into
AdaptiveWatchdog methods. Add 12 unit tests and 5 property tests
validating counter accuracy, monotonicity, and serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
